description: Full PokeAPI species+forms list cached by pokelike.xyz in localStorage

breakdown.alt_forms: 1026-1350 (deoxys forms, megas, alolan, galarian, hisuian, paldean, gmax, etc.)

game_relevant_ids.notes: Game uses Gen 1 Pokemon (1-151) plus select Gen 2+ evolutions (Steelix=208, Scizor=212, Crobat=169, Espeon=196, Umbreon=197, etc.)

source: Extracted from pokelike.xyz localStorage, PokeAPI v2 /api/v2/pokemon?limit=1350
